title: blumea pubigera
intro: Blumea pubigera, also known as Indian thistle or Indian fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Blumea pubigera include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant and anticancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or ointments to treat various health conditions, although further scientific research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
